posts.name: Brew
posts.tagline: Like Claude design for email marketing
posts.description: Brew is the fastest way to design and send beautiful, on-brand emails and automations that render perfectly in every inbox. Describe a campaign or a multi-step automation in plain English, and Brew builds the whole thing in seconds: copy, design, audience, and logic. Works with any AI agent: paste our docs into OpenClaw, Viktor, Claude, or Lovable. No lock-in: send from Brew or export to your ESP. Free to get started.

posts.name: Bond
posts.tagline: Outbound campaigns powered by real buying signals
posts.description: Bond is your AI GTM Engineer. Tell it who you want to reach. It builds the audience, plans the campaign, writes the messaging, and executes it end to end. Every data provider and outreach tool you need, in one workflow. Build your first campaign in 15 minutes.

posts.name: Rezonant
posts.tagline: Talk, spec, ship: get your product ideas into production
posts.description: Rezonant helps product teams turn messy ideas into code-ready specs, tickets, and engineering tasks. Collaborate with PMs, engineers, designers, and AI agents in one shared workspace. Ground decisions in your actual codebase, keep everyone aligned on the same version, and create work that humans and coding agents can confidently ship.

posts.name: QuakPit
posts.tagline: Meeting reminders that actually make you smile.
posts.description: Quakpit is a macOS menu bar app that connects to your calendar and sends an animal-piloted plane flying across your screen before your meetings start. A duck, a dinosaur, a pigeon, a capybara, or a dog, your choice, cruises across your display towing a banner with your meeting name and how long you have left. Hard to ignore. Impossible to hate. Free to download & open source. Connect your calendar, pick your animal, never miss a meeting.

posts.name: Parrot Speech-to-text API
posts.tagline: Fast, accurate STT for production-grade voice agents
posts.description: Introducing Parrot: Ringg’s speech-to-text model for production-grade voice agents. Capture Hindi-heavy and noisy real-world conversations with low-latency inference, stronger transcript quality, and Hindi validation built for downstream workflows.

posts.name: AVTR-1 Real-Time Open Weights Model
posts.tagline: Generating uncanny AI avatars is now open source
posts.description: The best real-time avatar model in the world is now open source with open weights. Take the model, tweak it, and use it at $0 cost. What's unique: our model listens while you speak — full-duplex; the avatar reacts in real-time, with minimal latency. • Every frame is generated, avoiding annoying animation loops from pre-rendered playback. • Full streaming infrastructure included so you can get started right away.

posts.name: Willow Scribe
posts.tagline: Tell Scribe what to say. It writes the rest.
posts.description: Willow Scribe lets you speak the gist of what you want to say and writes the full message for you in your own voice. You talk the way you actually think and a finished message comes out the other side, ready to send. It works inside the apps where you already write the most like email, Slack, iMessage, and Google Docs. You can also highlight any text on your screen, tell Willow how to change it, and the selection gets rewritten in place. The more you use it, the more it sounds like you.

posts.name: SelectPrism
posts.tagline: Agents that screen and interview so you can hire faster
posts.description: SelectPrism helps hiring teams meet their strongest candidates without getting buried in the process of finding them. Upload a job description, and SelectPrism takes it from there. It interviews applicants, evaluates their fit, and hands your team a shortlist of people worth meeting. Your recruiters get their time back to focus on what actually moves the business: closing the right people.

posts.name: Ferrari Luce
posts.tagline: The first electric Ferrari designed by LoveFrom
posts.description: The Ferrari Luce is a project designed to deliver an unmistakable Ferrari character, where performance, thrills, design, and life on board come together in a new way of driving. With 1050 cv, advanced vehicle dynamics, and a dedicated platform, this model brings together four electric engines, active suspension, four-wheel steering, and advanced dynamic control systems. Inside, deeply engaging tactile controls unite the best of the physical and digital worlds.​

posts.name: DodoForm
posts.tagline: Turn talking, pics, or scribbles into clean, structured data
posts.description: Voice, photos, messy notes — DodoForm turns however people communicate into clean structured data. 100+ templates, AI-powered analytics, native integrations, and branded forms. Done in seconds, not minutes. 14-day Pro trial, no card.

posts.name: Parsewise API
posts.tagline: API for agentic multi-document processing
posts.description: One API call replaces the entire document processing pipeline. You send multiple documents and a desired output schema; you get back resolved values, flagged contradictions, and full lineage down to the source words, pages, and documents, with bounding boxes you can embed directly into your own UI for human validation. No parsing, classification, stitching, or custom verification interface to build or maintain.

posts.name: LangPanda
posts.tagline: Learn languages from watching your favorite shows
posts.description: LangPanda helps you learn 36 languages by watching your favorite shows. Instant dictionary, flashcard creation, vocabulary tracking. 7-day free trial.

posts.name: marpy.io
posts.tagline: AI coding platform built specifically for the Python stack
posts.description: Marpy is a web-based IDE and AI coding assistant built specifically for the Python stack. It helps you go from idea to deployed app without wrestling infra, glue code, or half-baked JS-focused tools. Get Python-native autocomplete, refactors, and AI-generated modules that actually understand Django, FastAPI, and real-world backends. Marpy lets you prototype, iterate, and ship production-grade Python apps faster, all from your browser.

posts.name: Kept
posts.tagline: Your AI chats, saved as Markdown locally with no cloud
posts.description: Kept: is an AI chat and productivity tool on your local archive. Captures conversations from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and Kimi as Obsidian compatible markdown on your filesystem, with full-text search, knowledge graph, and an MCP servers. MIT license. View your Vault locally,

posts.name: crunr
posts.tagline: Launch and run any compute job on AWS with 1 command
posts.description: crunr — run it, ghost it. GPU compute is $1.5/hr. But your real bill looks like this: - Idle time sitting there: $800/mo - Infra team to manage it: $3,000/mo - Failed setups and debugging: days lost - 3am emergency fixes: priceless crunr fixes all of it. $ crunr run train.py --gpu Spins up → runs → terminates. You pay for compute only. Nothing else. No idle bills. No DevOps. No lingering servers. Built for ML researchers, indie AI builders, and startup teams who just want their job to run.

posts.name: MiniCPM5-1B
posts.tagline: A new SOTA for compact open models on the edge
posts.description: MiniCPM5-1B is a dense 1B open model built for on-device and local deployment. It supports 131K context, Think / No Think modes, tool calling, GGUF and MLX formats, major inference backends, and even powers an offline desktop pet.

posts.name: DNSimple CLI
posts.tagline: Manage Your DNS from the Command Line with DNSimple CLI
posts.description: Manage your domains and DNS without leaving the terminal, built for developers who live in their terminals and CI pipelines. What you can do: create, update, and delete DNS records; register domains and manage renewals; issue and manage SSL/TLS certificates; run it in CI with API token auth and structured output. Built in Go, it uses the same foundation as our official client libraries and Terraform provider. Read our announcement: https://blog.dnsimple.com/2026/05/announcing-the-dnsimple-cli/

posts.name: LikePulse
posts.tagline: See exactly where YouTube audiences react — instantly
posts.description: LikePulse analyzes YouTube comments in real time to show you the exact moments where audiences peaked. Open any video and get: • Engagement heatmap — comment spikes overlaid with Most Replayed data • Key moments — the exact timestamps with the highest audience reaction • AI analysis — Claude Haiku explains why each moment resonated • Product detection — AI finds Amazon products mentioned in the video Free. No account. No tracking. Works on any YouTube video instantly.

posts.name: blokdots 3.0
posts.tagline: Prototype hardware visually, export real C++ for engineering
posts.description: blokdots is a visual tool for building interactive hardware. Connect sensors, motors, and more with a simple trigger-action interface — no coding required. 3.0 is a ground-up rebuild with our own C++ framework — replacing Firmata entirely. Export real C++ or JavaScript code, hand off to engineering, or go fully standalone: upload directly to Arduino, no more laptop needed! Connects to ProtoPie, Figma, and Socket.IO for integrated UI + hardware prototyping.

posts.name: Ormedo
posts.tagline: Let AI agents handle your entire outbound pipeline
posts.description: → Agent reads your site, builds your buyer profile, and finds leads worth reaching. → Drafts personalized email sequences and LinkedIn notes, using real real signals. → You approve in one click. It sends, times follow-ups, and tells you exactly when to show up on LinkedIn.

posts.name: Ajar
posts.tagline: Lid Angle Sync & Keep Awake for AI Agents on Mac
posts.description: Ajar makes your Mac respond to what you're doing, not what you remember to press. Lid Angle Sync maps your MacBook's lid angle to screen brightness, keyboard backlight, and system volume. Multiple displays are supported, with per-display offsets. Awake keeps the Mac awake when you're actually working. Built-in rules detect Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI sessions. Add your own for apps, Wi-Fi, disks, power, or a closed-lid clamshell.

posts.name: Tesserac
posts.tagline: A spatial alternative to Cmd+Tab for macOS
posts.description: Tesserac replaces the flat Cmd+Tab strip with immersive spatial layouts designed for speed, focus, and muscle memory on macOS. Hold a key, glance at your apps, and release to switch. Choose between Spatial Ring, Grid, List, and Glass Orb layouts. Pin favourite apps, ignore clutter, and switch instantly using keyboard shortcuts or modifier keys. Built for keyboard-driven workflows. Native on Apple Silicon. Private by design. No subscription. 7-day free trial. One-time purchase.

posts.name: Hayley: Your Thinking Companion
posts.tagline: An insight, a pattern, one question worth sitting with.
posts.description: Speak for 60 seconds. No prompts, no structure, just say what's on your mind. Hayley reflects back three things: an insight about what you're really saying, a pattern detected across your sessions, and one question worth sitting with. Not a chatbot. Not voice notes. Not therapy. A thinking companion that pays close attention, session after session. On-device transcription. Nothing leaves your phone. 14-day free trial.

posts.name: Trace
posts.tagline: No-frills offline meeting transcripts with context
posts.description: A macOS menu-bar app that turns any conversation into a clean markdown transcript, with a local speech model running entirely on-device. One global shortcut brings up a small bar at the bottom of your screen. It captures your mic and the system audio as separate tracks, labels who said what, and lets you flag key moments mid-call that sit inline at the right timestamp. No bot joins the call, nothing leaves your Mac, no account, no subscription.

posts.name: NoteCove
posts.tagline: Notes, tasks, and AI — offline-first, no SaaS bill.
posts.description: Local-first notes and tasks that sync through your own cloud storage that you already trust. Agent accessibility via NoteCove's CLI and MCP. Ability to make NoteCove accessible to remote VMs where your agents run. Semantic search, configurable kanban boards, LaTeX math formatting, document history, Google Docs style comments on notes (which your agent can see and respond to via MCP/CLI) and more!

posts.name: AI Shadowing
posts.tagline: Turn any YouTube video into a language shadowing lesson
posts.description: Shadow any YouTube video without scrubbing the progress bar or switching to a dictionary. Click any sentence to loop, click any word for AI grammar explanation. Free, no signup, browser + Android. Built by a self-taught German learner (A0→A2 in 3-4 months).

posts.name: ReplylessAI Sequences
posts.tagline: Outbound email sequences without the sales-tool bloat
posts.description: Send email sequences directly from your personal AI email app — without buying expensive outreach tools or spending days setting up complicated sales software. Create follow-up sequences, personalize emails, and keep outreach moving from the inbox you already use, comes with out of the box delivery and click tracking. Built for builders, founders, creators, agencies, and small teams who want the power of outbound automation without turning their email workflow into a full-time ops project.

posts.name: Prava Pay
posts.tagline: Give your AI Agent a one-time card to make payments-safely
posts.description: Prava Pay gives AI Agents a one-time card to make payments- without exposing real card data. You can install Prava Pay in your AI Agents like openclaw, hermes, claude code, codex etc. and let your agent order lunch, coffee, groceries, and book a table or appointment. We're official partners of Visa Intelligent Commerce and soon launching with other card networks.

posts.name: OrcaSheets Data Lake
posts.tagline: The analytics stack for teams that don't have one
posts.description: OrcaSheets Data Lake gives you a secure endpoint to send any data to OrcaSheets. No warehouse setup or extra tools needed. Your data lands in an encrypted silo, ready to query in plain English, visualise in dashboards, and turn into AI Reports. One platform from ingestion to insight.

posts.name: Summit AI Notes
posts.tagline: Local-first meeting notes with full data ownership.
posts.description: Summit turns meetings into searchable, structured knowledge — fully local by default, with Markdown export, semantic search, speaker recognition, and no vendor lock-in. Use local AI, cloud models, or your own infrastructure. Your conversations stay portable and under your control.

posts.name: Wicely
posts.tagline: Your autonomous R&D analyst
posts.description: Wicely is your autonomous R&D analyst. It monitors patents, research papers, and industry news across your business lines and turns technological noise into actionable intelligence, delivered as weekly reports tailored to your context. R&D and innovation teams use Wicely to track emerging technologies, scout solutions, and act on signals before competitors do.

posts.name: RaveRep
posts.tagline: Build a raving reputation with RaveRep.com
posts.description: One link to build a raving reputation — for reps, creators, freelancers, and businesses. Collect real video & text testimonials on a profile you own, with booking, a digital card, and CRM built in. Share it anywhere. Free to start.

posts.name: Gateplex
posts.tagline: Real-time governance firewall for autonomous AI agents
posts.description: Gateplex intercepts every AI agent action in real time before it executes. Set guardrail rules, block financial transactions over threshold, detect PII, and export compliance-ready audit trails. One API call. Any LLM. Any framework.

posts.name: Feedjolt
posts.tagline: Customer feedback. Flat price. Unlimited users. Dev-native.
posts.description: Collect, prioritize, and act on customer feedback with Feedjolt, built specifically for B2B SaaS teams. Unlike heavier or more expensive tools, Feedjolt offers flat pricing, unlimited end users, and a developer-friendly setup. It includes public and private feedback boards, Slack and Linear integrations, AI-assisted triage, roadmap publishing, and changelogs, helping teams turn scattered feedback into clear product decisions faster.

posts.name: VitaFlow Health
posts.tagline: Blood test tracking for your whole family — not just you
posts.description: Most health apps are built for one person. VitaFlow is built for households. Up to 4 fully isolated profiles — track yourself, a parent, a child, or an older relative without anything mixing. Each profile has its own labs, trends, and health log. The health log is your best friend: track supplements, medications, and lifestyle changes, then watch whether your markers actually move. That connection doesn't exist anywhere else. Plus real PDF extraction and borderline flagging. No manual entry.

posts.name: WeLiveLife
posts.tagline: Elderly Care At the Comfort of Your Home
posts.description: Get help managing your parent's care. Medication management, insurance navigation, appointment coordination. We're families helping families.

posts.name: Recite
posts.tagline: Drop receipts. Everything else is automatic.
posts.description: Imagine gaining hours of extra break time every single week while your business finances effortlessly organize themselves. You deserve a business that stays perfectly tidy and audit-ready every single day, giving you total peace of mind without the boring, soul-crushing manual grind. Meet Recite - Financial co-pilot built for solopreneurs, freelancers, and lean teams to put their back-office on complete autopilot for just $3/month.

posts.name: InfraOne AI Labs
posts.tagline: Instant AI Labs for Research & Learning  — Free 15-Min trial
posts.description: Launch a complete AI/ML environment in under 60 seconds. Jupyter, VS Code, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Transformers, and GPUs pre-configured. Free 15-minute trial. No credit card required.

posts.name: Aria
posts.tagline: Your AI Screen Companion
posts.description: Aria is an AI-powered screen companion for Windows that understands what’s on your display in real time. Capture any app, UI, error, document, or workflow and ask questions naturally — Aria explains interfaces, fixes issues, summarizes content, and guides you step-by-step without requiring screenshots or copy-pasting. Whether you're coding, designing, studying, or just exploring software, Aria turns your screen into an interactive conversation.

posts.name: SpecDD
posts.tagline: Build better software with spec-driven AI
posts.description: SpecDD is an open-source framework for specification-driven development with AI. Unlike existing AI coding workflows built around prompts, chat history, or massive docs folders, SpecDD keeps small structured specs close to the code they describe. The goal is to preserve intent before, during, and after implementation, reducing correction loops, architectural drift, and “plausible but wrong” AI-generated code.

posts.name: SpecDD
posts.tagline: Build better software with spec-driven AI
posts.description: SpecDD is an open-source framework for specification-driven development with AI. Unlike existing AI coding workflows built around prompts, chat history, or massive docs folders, SpecDD keeps small structured specs close to the code they describe. The goal is to preserve intent before, during, and after implementation, reducing correction loops, architectural drift, and “plausible but wrong” AI-generated code.

posts.name: Project AIR by Vindicara
posts.tagline: Open source SDK for AI agent governance and audit
posts.description: Cryptographic chain-of-custody. Court-supportable records. Rekor-anchored proof. Every action your agents take, bound to a workload identity, anchored on a public transparency log, independently verifiable by anyone. AIR isn't a guardrail, a governance dashboard, or a compliance checklist. It's the forensic substrate underneath — producing signed evidence the rest of the stack can consume. Built for EU AI Act Article 72 (Aug 2, 2026). Four shipping layers, pip install ready.

posts.name: AppLighter · Full
posts.tagline: Full-stack React Native templates your AI agent won't break
posts.description: Full-stack React Native + Expo templates. Designer-vetted, security-audited, agent-ready. Ships with skills and slash commands. Works with Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, and Windsurf.

posts.name: AdminForth
posts.tagline: Agent-first open-source admin panel framework
posts.description: Two years ago, we launched AdminForth as an open-source framework to reduce repetitive back-office development. Today, we’re relaunching it as an agent-first admin framework. AdminForth lets you build production-ready admin panels on top of existing databases, with CRUD, permissions, plugins, and a built-in AI agent that safely works through the same resources, actions, and business rules as human admins. Still free. Still open source.

posts.name: Whizo AI
posts.tagline: Your Agency on Autopilot.
posts.description: Whizo AI is the all-in-one platform built for digital agencies tired of juggling 5–7 disconnected tools. One workspace for everything: manage clients & workspaces, track tasks on kanban, find and qualify leads, schedule social content with AI, run WhatsApp campaigns, build SOPs, monitor KPIs, and deploy AI agents to automate repetitive work.

posts.name: Alliances PRO
posts.tagline: #1 Follow-up focused CRM for Small Businesses
posts.description: Alliances PRO is an AI-powered CRM platform specifically for small businesses to manage lead and deal follow-ups. Built with service-based businesses in mind.

posts.name: Helix
posts.tagline: Your Business Blueprint
posts.description: Founders don't need another plan. They need a business blueprint. Helix is an AI-native canvas that turns your raw idea into a structured context that can be handed off to your team, your code editor, and every agent in your stack. Built for founders who ship.

posts.name: Monghoul
posts.tagline: MongoDB GUI with a smart autocomplete & 70+ MCP tools
posts.description: I live in MongoDB most days. Every GUI still looks like 2003 Excel, so I spent a year building the one I wanted. Monghoul: 33 MB desktop GUI. Tauri + Bun sidecar, cold start under 2s. Autocomplete reads your data: field paths, types, enum values, even fields created by earlier pipeline stages. Visual aggregation builder. Explain plan graded A to F. Charts. 70+ MCP tools for Claude and Cursor. Free tier. Pro $9/mo, $72/yr, $128 lifetime. 14-day trial, no card, no signup.

posts.name: DooDash
posts.tagline: Wordle meets streaks but you draw instead of guess
posts.description: DooDash drops one creative theme every day. Draw your take on it. Feed stays completely locked until you submit. Then see how your friends drew the exact same thing. Custom crayon engine. Global feed. Friend streaks. Bad artists welcome.

posts.name: Mira
posts.tagline: Your agentic exit interviewer
posts.description: Mira interviews your team, learns from their work, and builds a memory that never forgets. Available to all your agents via MCP.

posts.name: Tuteliq
posts.tagline: Protecting what matters most - Child safety, codified
posts.description: Unlike key word filters that scan single messages, Tuteliq detects behavioral patterns across conversations such as: grooming, coercion, deepfakes, AI-Child Abuse Material, scams, self-harm, and more. Models trained on 50M+ data points labelled by criminologists and psychologists. Multimodal (text, audio, image, video, docs), 27 languages, sub-400ms, zero retention, EU-hosted. 10 SDKs, integrations for Roblox/Discord/Slack/Telegram. KOSA, COPPA, DSA ready!

posts.name: KOBI
posts.tagline: Your team's second brain — but it actually remembers
posts.description: Every week your team makes critical decisions — then loses them across 12 Slack threads. KOBI is a multi-agent AI workspace with 6 experts (Idea · Strategy · Analytics · Maps · Knowledge · General) that share one project memory, so context never falls through the cracks.

posts.name: AI Ad Workflows
posts.tagline: Generate 100s of ads a day with AI workflows
posts.description: Introducing AI Ad Workflows, generate 100s of ads on autopilot thanks to Claude + MakeUGC - Sync LLMs to AI ad creation - Added 600+ New Avatars - Available in 60+ languages - Product in hand + B-Roll

posts.name: ScanEx
posts.tagline: Scan, OCR & analyze documents on iOS & Android
posts.description: ScanEx is a professional document scanner for iOS & Android. Scan documents with your camera, extract text with OCR, analyze contracts, scan ID cards & invoices, sign & watermark PDFs, merge and compress files — all in one app.

posts.name: NeuroSpark AI
posts.tagline: Recall your notes during commute. Built by a 16yo student
posts.description: The hands-free active recall tool for students who want to study while commuting, working out, or walking. Create flashcards, quizzes and high quality summaries. Build by a high schooler.

posts.name: Agnixa Recon 2.0
posts.tagline: Recon 2.0 brings automated fix generation all in one scan.
posts.description: A smarter, more capable security analysis brain. Recon 2.0 brings AI-native vulnerability triage, automated fix generation, expanded compliance coverage, and structured reporting - all in one scan.

posts.name: Fastlytics
posts.tagline: You already know who won. Now find out why.
posts.description: Deep F1 analytics with advanced telemetry analysis, session replays, head-to-head driver comparisons, and an MCP server. The tool F1 fans and data nerds deserve. Free for current season, $5.99/mo for Pro.

posts.name: Three Office
posts.tagline: Virtual office with spatial voice chat and AI meeting notes
posts.description: Three-Office — browser-based virtual workspace for remote teams. Walk into the lobby, bump into colleagues for a 1:1 voice chat, sit at a conference table for a group meeting with AI-powered live transcription and Claude meeting summaries.

posts.name: Plain
posts.tagline: News without the noise.
posts.description: Plain is a news platform with no ads, no clickbait, and no autoplay videos. It’s fully user-supported, so we answer to readers, not corporations or advertisers. Our AI editorial engine analyzes dozens of major sources, synthesizes the facts, and writes straightforward news without sensationalism or bias. Stories are ranked by consequence and urgency, not the level of outrage they'll cause.

posts.name: BeTeam
posts.tagline: Sports predictions with friends. Without the gambling part.
posts.description: Open a private league with your friends, predict match results before kickoff, and climb the leaderboard. The app does the boring stuff — scoring, locking predictions, organizing the table — so you can spend Saturday arguing about who actually called the match. 🚫 Not a betting product. No deposits, no real money, no cash prizes. Ever. ✅ iOS live · Android in review · 6 languages on day one · Football + basketball + Hockey

posts.name: Synapse
posts.tagline: 2.9MB - Screenshot, OCR, clipboard, keep awake & more
posts.description: A Mac app that provides screenshot, OCR, clipboard, Keep Awake, Notch Shelf and more, All in 2.9MB. Turn off what you don't use. Low RAM, low CPU, always.

posts.name: Calculorie
posts.tagline: Snap a photo and know exactly what you eat
posts.description: Most nutrition apps feel like spreadsheets. Calculorie makes food tracking instant: snap a photo and AI automatically estimates calories, protein, fats, carbs, vitamins, minerals, and more. Choose eating styles like High Protein, Keto, Mediterranean, or create your own custom macro plan. Track water, weight, nutrition trends, watch food videos, and play “Guess the Calories”. Free on iOS & Android.

posts.name: Bae by ppl.studio
posts.tagline: The AI partner who actually remembers you.
posts.description: Bae is an AI partner builder with memory that actually holds — across months, not days. Two minutes from open to first conversation. No login, no card. Pick a shape (30+ hand-written archetypes), pick a face, tell them what to call you.

posts.name: BeTeam
posts.tagline: Sports predictions with friends. Without the gambling part.
posts.description: Open a private league with your friends, predict match results before kickoff, and climb the leaderboard. The app does the boring stuff — scoring, locking predictions, organizing the table — so you can spend Saturday arguing about who actually called the match. 🚫 Not a betting product. No deposits, no real money, no cash prizes. Ever. ✅ iOS live · Android in review · 6 languages on day one · Football + basketball + Hockey

posts.name: Transita
posts.tagline: Match your profile to visa pathways across 8 countries
posts.description: AI-powered immigration path optimizer. Find your best visa options across the US, Canada, UK, Australia, Germany, Spain, the Netherlands, and Portugal — ranked by your eligibility. Free, instant results.

posts.name: I Gave Up
posts.tagline: Record, transcribe, summarize. Powered by your own API key.
posts.description: Record your screen, get a full transcript, and an AI summary automatically. Your API key, your data.

posts.name: Tendr
posts.tagline: A to-do app with a pet that dies if you neglect it
posts.description: Tendr is a journal-shaped productivity app with a virtual pet at the center of it. Finish tasks to earn XP, spend XP to feed your pet, focus to build your bond. Forget for three days and it's gone. A quiet almanac for getting things done.

posts.name: Sendmux Feedback Widget
posts.tagline: Feedback widget that routes to email, webhooks, or AI agents
posts.description: Drop-in web component for collecting feedback on any website. One custom element with Shadow DOM isolation, dark mode, keyboard support, and SSR-safe imports. Sends structured JSON to your endpoint, any webhook, or a server-side Sendmux relay. Your downstream process classifies issues, groups duplicates, routes to support, or creates GitHub issues. Feedback becomes email your AI agent workflow can act on. Not another dead spreadsheet. Fully open source under MIT. Works with any stack.

posts.name: DescribX Alpha
posts.tagline: Master English expression by describing photos you take
posts.description: DescribX helps non-native English speakers smash the fluency plateau using multimodal AI. Snap or upload any real-world photo, speak or write your description, and receive a granular evaluation mapped to the CEFR framework alongside explicit pronunciation subscores and advanced vocabulary alternatives. Also features AI-driven Shadow Learning with hyper-realistic human voice generation and offline PDF/ZIP bundle exports. 100% free with no storage of your photos, voice recordings or descriptions.

posts.name: Epsilon
posts.tagline: A structured canvas workspace for your ideas
posts.description: Most note apps either give you a blank page or force you into a rigid structure. Epsilon is different. You get a canvas where you can place blocks exactly where you want them. Notes, markdown, code snippets, images, todos. Each space is yours to organize however makes sense to you. No AI suggestions, no templates you have to fight against. Just a clean workspace where you decide the layout. Built this over the past month as something I actually wanted to use. Would love to hear what you think.

posts.name: FDM AI Document Editor Online
posts.tagline: Edit PDFs and Docs Instantly — No Login Required
posts.description: FDM AI is a privacy-first, zero-login platform bringing professional-grade document, media, and PDF tools to your browser. Powered by our proprietary fdmGTP engine, FDM AI allows you to create, edit, and convert files locally—your data never leaves your machine. With 30+ free tools in one suite, we eliminate the need for cloud uploads, account sign-ups, or software installation. Fast, secure, and built for modern, privacy-conscious workflows, FDM AI is the ultimate digital productivity.

posts.name: Hustler
posts.tagline: Your habit streak on every new tab — no account needed
posts.description: Hustler turns your Chrome new tab into a habit streak wallpaper. See your streak every time you open a tab — mark today done in one click. Track multiple habits (Reading, Workout, Meditation, or custom). Each has its own streak, calendar, and yearly heatmap. Add timestamped notes. Compare streaks with friends via copy-paste codes — no accounts, no servers. Privacy-first: vanilla JS, no analytics. All data stays on your device.

posts.name: nudge
posts.tagline: Turn meeting notes into automated tasks that close deals
posts.description: You think you need a CRM but you know you'll never actually use one. nudge is the fix. posts.description: SQA Audio is a desktop tool for video editors and content creators who work with messy sound effect folders. Drop your audio files or folders, and SQA Audio helps organize, rename, and structure them into a cleaner, ready-to-use audio library. It is built for editors, YouTubers, filmmakers, solo creators, and anyone who already has sound effects but wastes too much time finding the right one during editing. The goal is simple: less searching, more editing.

posts.name: Forge Lab
posts.tagline: You bring the knowledge. We bring the architecture.
posts.description: Turn any domain expert's plain-English workflow into a sovereign single-file HTML tool — Ed25519-signed Konomi licence baked in. Labs, clinics, farms, anything. Free during launch.

posts.name: Floating CTA
posts.tagline: Your readers scroll past your affiliate link. Fix that.
posts.description: Most CTAs scroll off the screen and out of mind. Floating CTA pins a small product bar to the bottom of your post and keeps it there while people read: name, star rating, price, and a buy button that's always one tap away. It's free, about 3KB, no jQuery, no account, and you set it per post so the bar matches the page. Built for review and affiliate content, but it works anywhere you want one clear action to follow the reader down the page. Free on WordPress.org.

posts.name: Goobity
posts.tagline: Your Desktop Has Eyes Now
posts.description: Goobity brings your desktop to life with customizable googly eyes tracking your cursor, but doubles as a local-first security alarm. Unlike basic widgets, it features snap/clap sound triggers, instant mouse-movement sirens, and rapid 20-photo webcam bursts to catch nosy coworkers. Plus, a built-in Pomodoro timer (swaps to a pixel skull in retro mode!). Zero cloud uploads—100% local processing for ultimate privacy.

posts.name: Soundeckd
posts.tagline: Rate music. Build your Deck. Share your taste.
posts.description: Soundeckd tracks what you actually think. Soundeckd is a social music review app where you rate albums, songs, and artists, write reviews, and build your personal "Deck" — your music identity in one place. Follow friends, sync with people who share your taste, and discover what the community is really listening to. Every review gets a serial number. Signal Pro unlocks monthly Insights, profile themes, advanced filters, story export for Instagram, and review translation.

posts.name: Calibrait
posts.tagline: Model your AI agent costs before you build
posts.description: Most teams discover their AI API bill after they've already built. Calibrait models the true cost of agentic AI workflows before you write a line of code. Unlike simple API calculators, Calibrait accounts for what actually drives agent costs: Context accumulation across steps (by step 8 you're paying 10× step 1) Tool call overhead Prompt caching and batch API discounts Real differences between providers Compare popular providers and self hosted costs. Export to PDF and csv.

posts.name: California vs Washington Tax Battle
posts.tagline: Real-time tax and living cost comparison tool
posts.description: Moving from California to Washington to escape high taxes? Do you know the exact math? I built this minimal, no-nonsense page to give you the exact breakdown on income tax, rent, and cost of living in seconds. Bonus: Want more? At the bottom of the page, there is a direct button to access our master dashboard, where you can easily compare any of the 50 US states in a simplified way!

posts.name: AppFromAI
posts.tagline: Write a sentence Generate an AI app module for iOS & Android
posts.description: Type a sentence. Get a real native iOS and Android UI module. No WebView, no mockups. AppFromAI converts prompts into structured JSON UI definitions using an LLM of your choice, then renders them as real native components. Tested with local models (Ollama + Qwen3-Coder) and structured outputs.

posts.name: Quote Sign
posts.tagline: Send quotes, get them signed, invoice — $19/mo flat
posts.description: QuoteSign is a simple quote + invoice tool for freelancers and small agencies: → Build quotes with line items, VAT, your logo → Client gets a link — signs online, no account needed → 1-click convert signed quote to invoice → Auto payment reminders (3, 7, 15 days overdue) → Recurring invoices that send themselves → Expense tracking + reports $19/mo flat. No per-seat fees. No surprise charges. Or grab the lifetime deal — $79 once, 40 spots only. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

posts.name: PromptForge
posts.tagline: Make your AI 100x smarter
posts.description: Transform weak prompts into expert-level AI instructions instantly inside ChatGPT. One click. Dramatically better answers.

posts.description: ComputerTool is a pure Python 3, zero-dependency, cross-platform command-line utility designed to discover, organize, and launch native system administration, diagnostic, and configuration tools across Windows, Linux, and macOS. - blackmatriXblack/computertool

posts.tagline: The dark aesthetic book tracker Goodreads wishes it was.

Velvet Spotlight is unique - an ARC marketplace at 1/10th of NetGalley's price, built directly into the reading experience. This isn't a Goodreads clone. It's what book tracking looks like when someone actually cares about how it feels.

posts.name: iBecome

Every week, AI selects a principle from top personal development books and builds daily missions tailored to your real life — your job, goals, and relationships. Experience a modern approach to talent acquisition with robust features, insightful analytics, and user-friendly interface. Elevate your hiring process with our innovative interview portal.

posts.name: Cotidie

One for every kind of night. — A Private Vault on your device. Never synced. Never seen by AI. — Voice dictation. Pattern insights. 10 languages. For the people who quit journaling at week three. iOS + Android. Free.

posts.name: KORE_
posts.tagline: Your resume scored, fixed, and ready before you apply
posts.description: Most resume tools rewrite and hope for the best. Kore calculates a deterministic ATS score before and after optimization so you know exactly what changed and why. posts.name: VeltrixDB
posts.tagline: Zero-compaction, memory-first NVMe key-value storage engine
posts.description: VeltrixDB: High-Performance KV Storage We built VeltrixDB for bare-metal NVMe. By ditching LSM-trees for an In-memory Adaptive Radix Tree (ART) and append-only Value Log, we’ve eliminated compaction spikes. Stack: Linux io_uring + Direct I/O. Performance: Flat, microsecond latencies at billion-key scale. Trade-off: Optimized for pure IOPS & lock-free point reads (No range queries). Perfect for HFT, AdTech & extreme caching. Benchmarks: https://github.com/VeltrixDB/veltrixdb-benchmark

posts.name: ContextVault never lose AI conversations

posts.description: ContextVault is a local-first Chrome extension that automatically records your AI conversations across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other LLMs. It turns them into structured Markdown or ZIP archives — fully owned by you, fully local, with zero backend. Key Features 🧠 Real-time AI conversation capture 🔄 Works across multiple LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) 💾 Local-first storage (no backend, no tracking) 📦 Export to Markdown / ZIP 🏷️ Organize by tags & projects

First production GGUF engine Rust all the way down — including the GPU shaders. Run TinyLlama, Llama 3.2, Phi, DeepSeek from GGUF. Drop-in for AnythingLLM, Open WebUI, Cursor, Zed via OpenAI or Ollama API. Windows, macOS, Linux. cargo install shimmy
